injection.template:
<reference_injection>
**Open threads — background continuity only ({{subject}}'s outstanding promises, debts, quests, goals). Reference or advance one ONLY when the scene naturally brings it up; do NOT steer the scene toward them, raise them unprompted, or treat them as the focus:**
{{fields}}
</reference_injection>

fields.label: Threads
fields.aiGuidance: Track obligations the protagonist takes on or resolves — promises, debts, quests, goals, grudges. ADD a row when one is created; DELTA `amount` for partial changes (e.g. paying down a debt); SET `status` to `fulfilled` (the protagonist came through) or `failed` (didn't / reneged / no longer applies) when it resolves. Reuse the EXACT name shown; don't restate threads already listed.
